name: BernieSanders.com
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
This is what we're up against, sisters and brothers: last month, the Clinton campaign held almost sixty fundraising events. They've often held these events with hedge fund managers, fracking interests, pharmaceutical executives, and other industries with business before the government.
Meanwhile, their Wall Street-funded super PAC spent ridiculous amounts of money to tip the balance in their favor in Super Tuesday states, and the trend continues in a number of contests happening over the next two weeks.
**But what the billionaire class has yet to realize is that in this election, their obscene wealth is their weakness.** Part of the reason we are doing so well and exceeded expectations last night is because the American people have had ENOUGH of a corrupt campaign finance system being used to buy our candidates and elections.
Our campaign is funded almost exclusively by 4.8 million individual contributions made by people like you. **So we 've set an important new goal: reaching 5 million individual contributions by the time Michigan votes in six days.**
[**Make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign and help us reach 5 million individual contributions by the time Michigan votes in six days.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-million?refcode=em160302pmfull "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-million?refcode=em160302pmfull")
When it comes to taking on Donald Trump in November, one thing is clear: Democrats, Independents, and Republicans alike are sick of the influence of big money in politics. We cannot afford to give Trump the upper-hand on this issue. It could be decisive.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

name: Rand Paul
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

What are the two most important issues to you
in 2016?

I'll tell you mine right now.

Getting wasteful spending under control
once and for all

Ensuring the fate of the Supreme Court is
not left to the Democrats.

I believe one of my most important jobs in
the Senate is to rein in the wasteful spending in Washington.
Over these past five years, I've returned
$2.4 million to the U.S. Treasury from money that was unspent in
our office operating budget.
I've been labeled the "most frugal lawmaker
in Congress" and I'm happy to uphold that title.
I take my responsibility to expose waste and
save taxpayer dollars very seriously. Our country cannot to
continue business as usual with the budget.
Last week, I asked the budget committee to
include my proposed cuts from 'The Waste Report' in the 2017
budget as a common sense solution to get us on the right track
this next year.
As it stands, the Federal Government has
racked up over $19 trillion in federal debt. That comes out to
over $60,000 per person alive today.
This is a real problem that cannot be
ignored.
Getting our spending under control is getting
crucial - and we can't trust a Senate without a voice for liberty
to do it.
A win for me in Kentucky this year is a win
for fiscal responsibility.
It's also a win for liberty and the
Republican party. Let me tell you why:
President Obama thinks he has the chance to
put an end to originalist interpretation of the Constitution by
appointing a liberal replacement to Justice Scalia's seat.
Right now we have a GOP majority and we can
block a liberal replacement, but if Democrats win the Senate and
lose the White House in November, they have the option to change
the entire path of our nation.
While the Constitution mandates the new
Congress begins January 3rd, 2017, President Obama is still in
Office until January 20, 2017. That means they have two weeks for
the President to send a nominee and with a Democrat majority, the
Senate could apply the 'nuclear option' and vote in the nominee
with a simple majority.
That would be a complete nightmare.
I cannot stress this enough: losing the
Senate in November is not an option.
Patriot, I need your help to make sure I make
it back for another term in January to stand up for common sense
in Washington.
Without a strong Senate, we cannot ensure
that our courts are upholding the Constitution. We cannot ensure
our country does not fall so far into debt that we cannot
recover.
That's why I am more committed to another
term for Kentucky and for this country.
Please stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

amount >>

body:
Dear Friend,

Tonight at 9 pm ET,
the remaining Republican candidates for president will take the
debate stage once again. And as the field winnows, the choice
becomes clear.

Conservatives who
care about jobs, freedom, and security should unite behind our
campaign because in Ted, they have a leader they can trust and
who has always fought against the corruption and for the American
people. Or they can go with a candidate who embodies the root of
the anger at Washington - a man who has spent his life expanding
public power for private gain. Donald Trump won't stop the
Washington deals - he'll only make more.

Tonight the contrast
between Ted Cruz and Donald Trump will be on display for the
nation to see: Ted Cruz has always kept his word, he's never been
afraid to stand up to the Washington cronies, and he will work
every day with a single-minded purpose - to serve the people of
this great nation so that together we restore prosperity and
bring back America's leadership in the world.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

name: ted@tedcruz.org (confidential)
subject: you know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
You know where I stand. So, please follow up with this message immediately. |
---
Friend,

You know where I stand.

But before the debate tonight, I need to know where you stand.

**Is it with me -- guided daily by the Bible and the Constitution?**

**OR is it with Donald Trump -- a self-proclaimed deal maker and supposed billionaire?**

If you stand with me, can I count on you to drop what you are doing and show your support with an emergency contribution?

[**I'm with you Ted >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33940657:sJOoOIC3N:m:1:1104269936:770C32D0799A9E1F552753ADCB7C74BA:r)

Friend, tonight I'm going to make the case that I'm the only candidate that has a path to the nomination and can defeat Hillary Clinton to become our next Commander-in-Chief.

_In the polling that Donald idolizes -- I am the ONLY true conservative that beats Hillary Clinton in virtually every single poll released after our decisive victory in Iowa._

**At the same time, almost every one of those same polls show Donald losing to Hillary in a head-to-head matchup.**

But before I can take on Donald Trump and his billions, I need your help, and I need it tonight -- BEFORE the debate.

[**I'm with you Ted >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33940657:sJOoOIC3N:m:1:1104269936:770C32D0799A9E1F552753ADCB7C74BA:r)

You see: Americans are frustrated with the last eight years -- Obamacare, the weakening of our national defense, the rise of political correctness, and big-government expansion with every stroke of Obama's pen.

**The only way to make America great again is to return to what made America great in the first place.**

So, tonight -- before I go on stage -- I'm making an urgent personal request of you.

[**Will you stand with me?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33940657:sJOoOIC3N:m:1:1104269936:770C32D0799A9E1F552753ADCB7C74BA:r)

Together, we can end the deal-making and defeat the self-serving Washington Cartel that dares to call themselves our "representation" in Washington.

This is our time, and I need you, Friend.

**I hope to hear from you before the debate.**

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

subject: Who can stop Trump?

body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46469877:6QZZrFrLN:m:1:1349778030:2183A62E6052AC5544EFED30BAB75865:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Marco can! And he did it tonight. Marco showed he is the candidate who can stop Donald Trump and beat Hillary Clinton this fall. Marco brought the knowledge, the judgment, and even the sense of humor necessary to lead our country and make this a New American Century -- and he showed why Donald Trump definitely can't. One of the most important moments: when Marco pointed out Trump's habit of resorting to personal attacks when he's asked a question on ANY policy issue, especially foreign policy.
---
| | [**> > STOP DONALD <<** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46469877:6QZZrFrLN:m:1:1349778030:2183A62E6052AC5544EFED30BAB75865:r)
---
| Marco laid out why the world is more complicated than it's been at any point in our lifetimes -- we have a rising China, rising Russia, Islamic terrorism spreading across the globe -- and Donald Trump laid out . . . his poll numbers.
At least, the poll numbers he likes -- not the gobs of polls that show him losing big to Hillary Clinton in the general election. If you want a candidate who can win, and who can keep America safe and lead on the world stage starting on Day One, [**go here right now to join Marco and chip in.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46469877:6QZZrFrLN:m:1:1349778030:2183A62E6052AC5544EFED30BAB75865:r) It's not just on foreign policy where Donald Trump has absolutely nothing to back up his tough talk -- on issue after issue, he's trying to con the American people. They need real answers to the problems facing us in the 21st century -- stagnating wages, the rising cost of everything from college to housing, the dysfunction of our public school system -- and Marco has them. Donald has bluster and slogans. We need Marco and his ideas. But it's going to be a long fight against this con artist. **[Can you spare $25 right now to help us keep it up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46469877:6QZZrFrLN:m:1:1349778030:2183A62E6052AC5544EFED30BAB75865:r)** Thanks, Terry SullivanCampaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President P.S. In some cases, Trump can't even consistently offer the same empty promises -- he take a stance on an issue one minute, only to flip to the opposite position literally minutes later. Tonight you actually saw him explicitly say he doesn't believe what he says in his own policy papers. Let's get serious -- you'll know where Marco stands. **[Help him win the nomination right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46469877:6QZZrFrLN:m:1:1349778030:2183A62E6052AC5544EFED30BAB75865:r)**

This really gets to me. | Friend --

If I hear one more person call Trump's campaign a joke, I'm going to scream.

It's not a joke to the millions of immigrants, people of color, and women in America who Donald Trump has already attacked. It's not a joke that he's threatened to defund Planned Parenthood, build a literal wall between the US and Mexico, and vowed to stop Muslims from entering the country altogether.
